title: Adversity
content:
A barren field o'ergrown with thorn and weed
    It stays for him who waits for help from God:
    Only the soul that makes a plough of Need
    Shall know what blossoms underneath its sod.
meaning:
Madison Julius Cawein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Adversity"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
